title: Patchnotes
comment_colors: Color per entry type (CSS color: hex, rgb(), or var(--accent)). Used for the badge + the row's left border.

entries.text: New loading screen with character info, team panel and patchnotes.
Music player with controls and multiple background images.
Server stats (player count and uptime) on the loading screen.
Completely new design in the server style.
Navigation buttons turned into compact icon buttons.
Various minor bugs fixed.
Added a drug system with labs.
New processing and storage mechanics for drugs.
Economy adjusted and rebalanced.
Improved performance while loading the map.
Removed the old tutorial area.
New clothing and prop selection in the quick menu.
Inventory UI redesigned in the HUD style.
Fixed an error when saving outfits.
Server release with ESX Legacy and the ox stack.
Server-wide time and weather synchronization.
Multicharacter with three character slots.
Custom chat in the HUD look.
Reworked the default spawn points.
Closed beta started.
Fixed numerous stability issues.
Removed outdated test resources.
